title: Tornado
description: Prepare in advance — tornadoes give minutes of warning, not hours.

items.text: Identify the lowest interior room in your home — bathroom, closet, or hallway
NOAA weather radio with Specific Area Message Encoding (SAME) set to your county
Download your county's emergency alert app (Wireless Emergency Alerts enabled on phone)
Know the difference between Tornado Watch (conditions favorable) and Warning (tornado confirmed)
Identify a heavy table or furniture in your safe room to shelter under
Bicycle helmet stored in safe room for head protection
Heavy blankets or sleeping bag stored in safe room to cover head and neck
Flashlight and extra batteries in safe room
Battery-powered or hand-crank radio in safe room
Water (at least 3 days) and non-perishable food in safe room
First aid kit accessible in safe room
Know your mobile home's nearest permanent structure — evacuate immediately on Warning
Phone charged and nearby during tornado season and at night
Family meeting point established if separated after storm
Out-of-area emergency contact designated (local lines overwhelmed after event)
